suppress.notes: False positive: jodconverter-core 4.4.11 is incorrectly matched to Gradle 4.4.11. These CVEs (Gradle vulnerabilities) do not apply to the JODConverter library.
False positive: CVE-2018-1258 affects Spring Security 5.0.5.RELEASE and earlier. Fixed in Spring Security 5.0.6 (2018). We use Spring Security 7.0.5 which is not affected.
False positive: spring-security-oauth2-resource-server is incorrectly matched to the legacy pivotal/pivotal_software spring_security_oauth CPE. These are different products.
False positive: spring-security-oauth2-resource-server is incorrectly matched to the legacy pivotal_software spring_security_oauth CPE. These are different products.
False positive: spring-security-web is incorrectly matched to the generic "web_project:web" CPE.

False positive: spring-graphql 2.0.3 is incorrectly matched to Spring Framework 2.0.3. spring-graphql is a separate library, not spring-framework. CVE-2016-9878 is a path traversal in Spring Framework 3.x/4.x and does not apply here.
